headline: Lockheed Martin MDCX Powers MQ-25A Flight And Reshapes LMT Valuation Narrative
summary: Lockheed Martin's Skunk Works MDCX platform enabled the first flight of the U.S. Navy's MQ-25A Stingray. The flight used MDCX as the command and control backbone for the autonomous refueling drone. The milestone marks a new role for NYSE:LMT in open architecture command, control, and autonomy for naval aviation. For investors tracking NYSE:LMT, this MQ-25A Stingray milestone sits at the intersection of defense electronics, software, and unmanned aircraft. The move adds another proof point...
